title: Improve Group select action
excerpt: Please consider build a Groups list expandable header, that header will let us avoiding have to scrolling so much to select the group to work in it, specially when each group contain so many items that create a big heigh…

posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please consider build a Groups list expandable header, that header will let us avoiding have to scrolling so much to select the group to work in it, specially when each group contain so many items that create a big height.
As desktop or mobile, imagine that we just select the group name in that header it will bring us the group items enlist on screen…
